user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my friends and we need some good music to keep us entertained. Can you help us search for tracks by Eminem on Deezer? Also, it would be great if you could provide us with a random Chuck Norris joke from the social category.

TaskList.description: Search for tracks by Eminem on Deezer.
Retrieve a random Chuck Norris joke from the social category.
